content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_415_ATP_Report
--drop view v_415_ATP_Report
as
SELECT          DISTINCT ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               ITM.ITDS AS [Item Description]
,               ITM.ITCL AS [Brand]
,               CASE WHEN ITM.ITCL IN ('GEN', 'DUUR', 'MXI', 'MXC', 'PGEN', 'PMXC', 'PMXI', 'SAP') then 'AFS'
                WHEN ITM.ITCL IN ('BEV', 'BLA') then 'Legacy'
                else 'Other' end as [Legacy Company]
,               ITB.WHLO AS [Warehouse] 
,               ITB.STQT AS [Quantity on Hand]
,               ITB.ALQT AS [Quantity Allocated]
,               ITB.STQT - ITB.ALQT AS [Quantity Available]
,               ORQA AS [Quantity on Order]
,               YRE1 as [Reference]
,               POL.PUNO as [Purchase Order Number]
,               POH.RGDT as [Order Date]
,               POH.DWDT as [Factory Ready Date]
,               left(cast(nullif(CAST(POH.UID2 as varchar(10)),0) as date),10) as [ETA Date]
,               POH.UID1 as [ETD Date]
,               ITM.PRGP as [Procurement Group]
,               POH.PUST as [High Status]
,               POL.PUPR as [Purchase Price]
,               POL.LNAM as [Line Amount]
,               POH.SUNO as [Supplier ID]
,               SM.SUNM as [Supplier Name]
FROM            M3.MITBAL ITB
JOIN            M3.MITMAS ITM ON ITB.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPLINE POL on ITM.ITNO = POL.ITNO and POL.WHLO = ITB.WHLO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPHEAD POH ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO      
LEFT JOIN       M3.CIDMAS SM ON POH.SUNO = SM.SUNO
WHERE           ITB.WHLO IN ('PKY', 'SNV', 'HNJ')
